title: Waterless Farmland
description: WaterlessFarmland is a lightweight Paper plugin that lets you farm **anywhere** without worrying about water sources.
body:
WaterlessFarmland is a tiny, server-side Paper plugin that lets you farm **anywhere** without needing water sources nearby.

### What it does
- Farmland **no longer dries out** when there is no water nearby.
- Prevents farmland from **reverting back to dirt** due to dryness.
- Trampling behaviour is unchanged – if players or mobs jump on farmland, it still breaks like vanilla.

This means you can build farms on rooftops, in skybases, or in aesthetic builds without having to hide water or spam waterlogged blocks. It only touches farmland behaviour and does **not** change villagers, mob griefing, or any other mob mechanics.

### Usage
- Drop the plugin jar into your `plugins` folder and restart the server.
- No commands, no permissions, no config – it just works.

### Compatibility
- Server: **Paper 1.21.10+** (should also work on most Paper forks).
- Client: vanilla – players don’t need any mods.
